title: Refinamiento · Polish and nuance
focus: Higher-register and literary vocabulary that lifts speech above intermediate.

words.example: Hubo un atisbo de esperanza en sus palabras.
words.example_en: There was a hint of hope in her words.

words.example: En el albor del proyecto, todo parecía posible.
words.example_en: At the dawn of the project, everything seemed possible.

words.example: Es menester revisar el contrato antes de firmar.
words.example_en: It is necessary to review the contract before signing.

words.example: Existe una discrepancia notable entre las cifras.
words.example_en: There is a notable discrepancy between the figures.

words.example: La libertad de prensa es una salvaguarda esencial.
words.example_en: Press freedom is an essential safeguard.

words.example: Apenas se vislumbra una solución a largo plazo.
words.example_en: A long-term solution can only barely be glimpsed.

words.translation_en: to wield; to put forward (an argument)
words.example: Esgrime argumentos sólidos contra la reforma.
words.example_en: He puts forward solid arguments against the reform.

words.example: Conviene ahondar en las causas reales del conflicto.
words.example_en: It's wise to delve deeper into the real causes of the conflict.

words.example: Habrá que enmendar el texto antes de publicarlo.
words.example_en: The text will have to be amended before publishing it.

words.translation_en: to stick to, to keep to
words.example: Debemos ceñirnos al presupuesto acordado.
words.example_en: We must stick to the agreed budget.

words.example: No conviene soslayar las dudas del comité.
words.example_en: It's not wise to sidestep the committee's doubts.

words.example: Presentaron un informe exhaustivo de la situación.
words.example_en: They presented an exhaustive report on the situation.

words.example: No hay pruebas fehacientes de su implicación.
words.example_en: There is no irrefutable evidence of his involvement.

words.example: El conflicto era totalmente soslayable.
words.example_en: The conflict was entirely avoidable.

words.example: Pronunció el consabido discurso de bienvenida.
words.example_en: He gave the customary welcome speech.

words.example: El tono ostensiblemente cambió tras la cena.
words.example_en: The tone noticeably changed after dinner.

words.example: El idioma se va asimilando paulatinamente.
words.example_en: The language is gradually absorbed.

words.example: A tenor de los datos, la tendencia es positiva.
words.example_en: According to the data, the trend is positive.

words.example: Vivía, a la sazón, en una pequeña aldea.
words.example_en: At that time, he was living in a small village.

words.example: Habida cuenta de la situación, mejor posponemos.
words.example_en: Given the situation, we'd better postpone.

words.translation_en: to resort to, to make use of
words.example: Tuvimos que echar mano de nuestros ahorros.
words.example_en: We had to resort to our savings.

words.example: Siempre se sale con la suya en las reuniones.
words.example_en: He always gets his own way in meetings.
